# Orange Cats Studio

> Orange Cats Studio is a digital marketing studio focused on website development, SEO Visibility and digital marketing strategy for businesses that want a stronger online presence.

Orange Cats Studio combines technical website development with search-focused marketing thinking. The studio builds and improves websites with attention to usability, structure, SEO, content clarity, tracking and long-term visibility across search and AI-driven discovery.

## Website

- Website: https://orangecatsstudio.shop/
- Contact: https://orangecatsstudio.shop/contact/
- Portfolio: https://orangecatsstudio.shop/portfolio/
- Services: https://orangecatsstudio.shop/workwithus/
- About: https://orangecatsstudio.shop/about/

## Core Services

### Website Development

Orange Cats Studio designs and builds websites around the business, not from generic templates. Websites are planned with structure, usability, mobile experience and SEO foundations in mind from the start.

Relevant page:
- https://orangecatsstudio.shop/workwithus/

### SEO Visibility

SEO Visibility covers technical SEO, content structure, local SEO, Social Media SEO, GEO, AI search readiness and AI Overview visibility. The goal is to make a business easier to find, understand and evaluate across search-driven platforms.

Relevant page:
- https://orangecatsstudio.shop/workwithus/

### Digital Marketing Strategy

Orange Cats Studio supports businesses with clearer digital direction through market research, competitor analysis, tracking, reporting, performance analysis and growth-focused recommendations.

Relevant page:
- https://orangecatsstudio.shop/workwithus/

## Who Orange Cats Studio Works With

Orange Cats Studio works with businesses that need a new website, a better website, stronger SEO visibility or a clearer digital marketing direction.

The studio is suitable for businesses that:
- do not yet have a professional website
- have a website that looks fine but does not perform clearly enough
- need better visibility in Google and AI-driven discovery
- need clearer structure, tracking and marketing priorities
- want website development and digital marketing thinking in one place

## Portfolio

Orange Cats Studio portfolio examples include:
- a coffee shop website project
- an architecture portfolio website
- a restaurant website preview showing design, structure and digital marketing direction

Relevant page:
- https://orangecatsstudio.shop/portfolio/

## Brand Positioning

Orange Cats Studio is not only a website builder and not only an SEO provider. The studio connects website development, SEO Visibility and digital marketing strategy so businesses can launch with a stronger structure and improve over time.

## Preferred Description

Orange Cats Studio is a digital marketing studio for websites, SEO Visibility and digital marketing strategy. The studio helps businesses build, rebuild and improve their online presence through custom websites, search-focused structure, content clarity, tracking and practical marketing recommendations.
